positive: A whimsical, stylized, geometric representation of a nocturnal forest landscape. The main subject is a glowing crescent moon hanging above stylized silhouette trees and meandering river forms. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print techniques, featuring strong, clean outlines and flat areas of color. Use deep indigo blues, emerald greens, midnight purples, and touches of luminous gold for contrast. The composition must be centrally focused, designed to look excellent as an all-over apparel print, with clean silhouettes and minimal complex gradients. Flat graphic elements are preferred, giving a vintage, ethereal, and mystical feel. The lighting is implied by the glowing elements (moon, fireflies), creating dramatic, high-contrast areas.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blur, low contrast, sketch, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, complex shading, poorly rendered anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands
